scripts.build: bun build js/app.js --outdir=../priv/static/assets --external fonts/* --external images/* && bun run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: cp routes.json ../priv/static/assets/ && cp robots.txt ../priv/static/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p ../priv/static/images ../priv/static/fonts && cp images/favicon.ico ../priv/static/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r images/* ../priv/static/images/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r fonts/* ../priv/static/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true
